Title: DONE: WebSocketBridge fully implemented with background receive loop
Description:
WebSocketBridge.cs now has a real System.Net.WebSockets.ClientWebSocket implementation with:
- Background receive loop using Channel<WorldEvent> so sends and receives don't block each other
- Proper JSON serialization: C# sends {action, arguments} (lowercase); Node.js sends {event, ...payload}
- Multi-frame message reassembly (handles large Minecraft world data)
- ParseEvent correctly extracts all JSON fields into the WorldEvent.Payload dictionary

Completed 2026-06-15.
